__prompts__.package_name: Your Python package name, in snake case (e.g. my_package)
__prompts__.license: SPDX license expression for pyproject.toml (e.g. LicenseRef-Proprietary)
__prompts__.author: Author name for pyproject.toml file
__prompts__.dev_python_version: Python version for local development, in {major}.{minor} (e.g. 3.12)
__prompts__.github_token_field: GitHub token field path in home_secret.toml, see https://github.com/MacHu-GWU/home_secret_toml-project
__prompts__.cloudflare_token_field: Cloudflare API token field path in home_secret.toml, see https://github.com/MacHu-GWU/home_secret_toml-project
__prompts__.aws_codeartifact_profile: AWS CLI profile for publishing package to AWS CodeArtifact
__prompts__.doc_host_aws_profile: AWS CLI profile for deploying documentation to AWS S3
__prompts__.doc_host_s3_bucket: AWS S3 bucket for storing versioned documentation
__prompts__.aws_account_id: Your 12 digits AWS Account Id where you put your CodeArtifact domain, e.g. 111122223333
__prompts__.aws_region: Your AWS CodeArtifact region name, e.g. us-east-1
